theme_notes: Touchstones: the US federal debt eclipsing GDP for the first time ever (perfectly on-theme), Arsenal vs PSG Champions League final in Budapest on May 30, Trump's 'intense bombing' ultimatum in Iran nuclear talks, and Kim K's liquid-metal moment at the 2026 Met Gala.
settled: All square. The Champions League final has higher stakes.
You're even. Arsenal haven't looked this settled in 20 years. Enjoy it.
Balance: zero. US debt-to-GDP ratio: not this lucky. You win.
youOwe: Less than Kim K's bodysuit costs to dry-clean. Still embarrassing.
Spirit Airlines died with more dignity than this debt.
The US debt grew more than this since breakfast. That's your bar now.
Enough to watch Arsenal lose from a Budapest pub. Poetic, honestly.
Iran gave the US a formal reply faster than you'll pay this.
The Dow's up 600 points today. Your payments are up zero. Asymmetric.
Kim K wore liquid metal to the Met Gala. You showed up owing this.
Trump threatened 'intense bombing' over Iran. Your partner is considering options.
The US-Iran deal is reportedly close. Your debt is reportedly payable. Any day now.
Arsenal's first final since 2006. This debt's first payment: equally uncertain.
Rubio flew to Rome to preserve a relationship. You can't even Venmo back.
The Bear is ending after season 5. This debt has no known finale.
The US federal debt just exceeded GDP for the first time. You're making it a trend.
PSG signed Dembele for less drama. Marginally.
You're not a roommate. You're a sovereign debt crisis in a hoodie.
The federal government just normalized debt-to-GDP. You are ahead of the curve.
The Pentagon is on standby for Iran. Your partner is on standby for an explanation.
PSG are defending champions. Your debt is also defending its right to exist.
theyOwe: They owe you less than it costs to stream the Champions League final. Still owed.
Less than Spirit Airlines refunded anyone. Not a high bar.
The 2026 Met Gala has already come and gone. This debt is more enduring than couture.
They owe you enough that Oman would've brokered a deal by now.
Iran's been at war. You've been at brunch. This tab is still your problem.
The Devil Wears Prada sequel just dropped. You're still the one wearing the debt.
Iran is closer to a nuclear deal than this payment is to arriving.
The Fed is fighting inflation. Nobody is fighting for you.
The stock market's at a record high. Your patience is at an all-time low.
Arsenal haven't won the Champions League. You haven't been repaid. Long-suffering solidarity.
The US debt grew by this amount in approximately eight seconds today.
PSG beat Bayern to reach Budapest. You can't even reach your Venmo app.
You are functionally the IMF for one person. The worst IMF.
The Dow nearly hit 50,000 today. The irony that you're owed this much is noted.
The US and Iran were 'moving toward a deal' this week. Be the deal.
The US debt exceeded GDP for the first time in history. You exceeded patience for the last time.
This is a geopolitical event. Oman should be involved.
Ted Turner built a media empire from nothing. You built a grievance. Both are legacies.
